subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Grief-Stricken, the Imprisoned, unto the servants of God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting, that they may detach themselves from all else save Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المحزون المسجون الی عباد الله المهیمن القیوم لینقطعن عما سواه
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @pairs in creation; male and female; B and E; agent and patient, @living waters; water of life
